post_copy:
Alaska got more than 500 public comments on a $10 billion North Slope AI data center. Fewer than a dozen said yes.

The state's comment window on Stak Energy's lease closes July 17. It is only one of four AI infrastructure decisions Alaska is making this month, and it is the only one that takes public comment at all.

This deck walks through the proposal, the 500 to 12 split, and the four rooms where Alaska's AI future is being decided this July.

Should Alaska's public land and gas power the AI boom, and who should get to decide?

#AlaskaEnergy #DataCenters #ArcticInfrastructure

document_title: Alaska's AI Land Rush: Four Rooms, One Open Door
aftercare: Post next Tuesday to Thursday, 8 to 11am Alaska time; document posts perform best midweek.
Paste the sources block as the FIRST comment within 60 seconds of posting.
Reply to every comment in the first 90 minutes; threaded author replies drive reach.
Check saves and comments at 48 hours; saves matter most for a keepable reference deck like this.
